_comment: MCP integration configs for Security Layer-Basis MVP v1. Sub-project of security-layer-basis/. MVP scope: only the integrations needed for MVP development and ConnectWise PSA + webhook delivery. Sensitive values use env-var references — never hardcode secrets.

github.description: GitHub integration: issues, PRs, code review, CI status for security-layer-basis MVP repo

filesystem.description: Filesystem access scoped to MVP sub-project directory only

sqlite.description: MVP-only: query the skill registry SQLite DB. Read-only by default. Used for skill scoring development and rule tuning.

postgres.description: Tenant config + audit log DB access (dev/staging only — never prod). Required for testing PSA adapter integration.

brave-search.description: Web search for MVP-relevant lookups: ATT&CK technique IDs (the 7 we map in MVP), ConnectWise API documentation, threat intel for CE-001/RS-001 patterns

sequential-thinking.description: Extended reasoning for: rule design, HITL threshold tuning, skill registry scoring decisions, false-positive triage

integrations._comment: MVP integration targets only. Full v6 PSA/SIEM/RMM list lives in parent project's mcp.json. Add v1.1+ targets here as they ship.

connectwise_psa._notes: MVP only supports ConnectWise PSA. Autotask/HaloPSA/Syncro added in v1.1+.

webhook_engine._description: Universal outbound webhook adapter — covers Rewst/Zapier/Tines/Slack/custom in MVP

vault._notes: Vault is non-negotiable in MVP. PSA credentials must be encrypted at rest from day one.

_deferred_to_v1_1._comment: Tracked here so we don't lose them. NOT enabled in MVP.
